query:
SELECT 
  o.name as org_name,
  o.id as org_id,
  COUNT(*) as total_responses,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ir.question_id) as unique_questions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ir.response IS NOT NULL AND ir.response != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_responses,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ir.response IS NOT NULL AND ir.response != '' THEN ir.question_id END) as unique_completed
FROM organizations o
LEFT JOIN intake_responses ir ON o.id = ir.organization_id
WHERE o.slug = 'radone-munson'
GROUP BY o.id;

SELECT question_id, COUNT(*) as count
FROM intake_responses
WHERE organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'radone-munson' LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY question_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
